open.description: Whether the backdrop is visible and active.

invisible.description:
When true the backdrop is transparent but still captures pointer events,
enabling click-to-close without dimming content behind it.

lockScroll.description:
Lock body scroll while the backdrop is open (counted lock — safe to nest
with other overlays). Set false when the consumer manages scrolling itself.

transitionDuration.description:
Enter/leave animation duration in milliseconds. Collapses to 0 under
`prefers-reduced-motion`. Overrides the default when provided.

class.description: Additional class names merged onto the root element.

unsupportedProps.name: children
unsupportedProps.description: Optional content rendered above the scrim (e.g. a Spinner for a loading state).

unsupportedProps.name: onclick
unsupportedProps.description: Click handler — use this to wire click-to-close on the scrim.
